title: Promotion methods
summary: 9609 AS — advertising, sales promotion, PR, and digital promotion.
learningObjectives: Explain role of digital and social media.
Evaluate promotion mix for target audience.

simpleExplanation.title: Communicating with customers
simpleExplanation.summary: Promotion informs, persuades, and reminds buyers. Mix of methods depends on budget, product, and segment.

sections.content: **Promotion methods** (3.3.5) contrasts **B2C mass media** vs **B2B personal selling**. Budget constraints matter in evaluation.
